CustomField.formula: IF( OR( ISPICKVAL( Module_Name__c , "Cost Reduction (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Customer Service (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "DCPC First Aid (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Depot Safety (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Other (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Roadside Safety – Recovery Vehicle (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Safe Culture (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Urban (1M)"), ISPICKVAL(Module_Name__c, "Smiths Training (1M)") ), 1, 0.5 )
CustomField.label: Module Value
